message:
🌱 Add opentelemetry: SIG documents should be owned by an OpenTelemetry account mission (#1508)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "opentelemetry-1147-sig-documents-should-be-owned-by-an-opentelemetry-account",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "opentelemetry: SIG documents should be owned by an OpenTelemetry account",
+    "description": "SIG documents should be owned by an OpenTelemetry account. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current opentelemetry deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your opentelemetry version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opentelemetry -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry\nhelm list -n opentelemetry 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working opentelemetry installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review opentelemetry configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant opentelemetry configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n opentelemetry -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry\nkubectl get configmap -n opentelemetry -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opentelemetry\n```\nRelated #1146\n\nAll SIG meeting note documents should be owned by an OpenTelemetry or CNCF google account. This will prevent access issues like we have seen before in the related issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for SIG documents should be owned by an OpenTelemetry account",
+        "description": "Related #1147 \nLogs doc previously owned by  recreated because it could not be transferred\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opentelemetry -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry\nkubectl get events -n opentelemetry --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"SIG documents should be owned by an OpenTelemetry account\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Related #1147 \nLogs doc previously owned by  recreated because it could not be transferred",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
